title: Bind pr-merge verification to base branch head
goal: Extend captain-run pr-merge verification so the observed base branch head is bound to the observed mergeCommit or classified when it advanced after execution.

acceptance.assertion: Post-merge verification observes refs/heads/<base> with a typed bounded GitHub call.
A clean passed receipt requires base ref object SHA to match the observed mergeCommit.oid when feasible.
If the base branch advanced after merge observation, receipt reports a distinct non-clean code such as base_branch_advanced_after_merge_observation.
GitHub API failure, invalid base-ref shape or missing mergeCommit fail closed.
Tests cover exact match, base advanced, API failure and invalid base ref result.

metadata.source: Grabowski captain-run PR #104/#106 reviews and follow-up triage
metadata.reason: PR #106 verifies mergeCommit.oid but does not yet bind the target branch ref to it.
